title: In Memoriam: Raphael Terry Dumont
summary: Raphael Terry Dumont “Ataaka / Raphadeelio”January 27, 2013—August 18, 2013 Raphael was very smart: he learned fast and enjoyed it. He was loving: he loved hugs and kisses. He was […] The post In Memoriam: Raphael Terry Dumont first appeared on Chugachmiut .
